ops.title: cco adopt: P4 review verdict (2026-07-18)
ops.body:
Finder + adversarial refuter (gpt-5.6-sol ×2) over the full uncommitted adopt diff; synthesis on fable. **13 fix items accepted**, dispatched as one opus fix wave:

1. Tier-1 PID match scoped to session cwd (was: sid substring over any claude's argv — could kill a claude in another dir whose prompt mentions the uuid).
2. Tier-2 attribution rework (the critical class): token-based argv exclusions (+`--resume` excluded), claudeProc gains a start time, and a cwd-only match is attributed to the target only when the target transcript was written during the process's lifetime — or nobody else claims it and the target is newest; otherwise the target adopts as dead or refuses as ambiguous. Fixes: adopting an old dead session in a dir with a live different session used to SIGTERM the live one.
3. `--pid` validated against snapshot + cwd + exclusions (was: any claude-basename pid accepted).
4. Pre-SIGTERM identity re-check; ESRCH-on-send = already-dead success.
5. Turn-start race: statusAcc now flips to StateWorking on a plain human prompt (intentional repo-wide semantics change); trailing-warning byte offset recorded before the readiness gate.
6. Adopting inside an already-managed worktree reuses the existing workstream row (was: duplicate row + duplicate backend workspace).
7. Relocate: rename moved late, compensation tears down the created workstream / renames the transcript back on failure.
8. Package-level mutex serializes placement across concurrent different-sid adopts (duplicate repo auto-create race).
9. New opCode `NotReady` for the quiescence bounce; CLI retries only NotReady (was: every Conflict retried — a dirty-relocate refusal hot-looped); --timeout ctx propagated into list RPCs.
10. Torn-final-line and torn-appended-fragment both surface as warnings.
11. insertAgent failure after successful Spawn now best-effort kills the orphan terminal (handleSpawn checked for the same gap).
12. Repo matching by git common-dir identity; worktree-session auto-create lands at the main checkout.
13. Head-window fallback: bounded streaming scan (~4MB) when the first cwd line sits past 64KB.

**Rejected**: relocate EXDEV scenario (both rename endpoints under the same projects dir — same filesystem by construction); "self-exit before SIGTERM aborts adoption" (resolved by item 4's ESRCH-as-success). Refuter's HOLDS list confirmed the load-bearing invariants: agentLock serialization, spawn-then-insert vs the supervisor, no-SIGKILL/no-backend.Kill, compensateSpawnLocked behavior parity, frame-before-tailer, CreatedAt=adopt-time, pre-kill deterministic refusals. Links: [[cco adopt: step-1 probe results (2026-07-18)]].
